headline: This Week In AI Chips - Powering AI The New ETF Revolutionizing Infrastructure Investment
summary: Wedbush Fund Advisers has launched the Dan IVES Wedbush AI Power & Infrastructure ETF (IVEP) to target companies crucial to the expanding AI infrastructure landscape. As AI technology adoption accelerates, the demand for energy and infrastructure has emerged as a significant factor, with AI workloads imposing higher energy requirements than traditional computing. IVEP aims to provide investors with access to the companies facilitating this expansion across key segments like power generation...

headline: Analyst’s $1,250 Call Makes Sandisk the AI Boom’s Pure-Play NAND Winner
